summary: Planned conservative PR-inventory classifications only. No GitHub mutations are recommended in this plan-mode shard; security-shaped items are quarantined and ordinary open PRs are kept for maintainer/product review or independent follow-up.

actions.reason: Third-party provider/plugin catalog changes touch the plugin trust/security boundary and are out of scope for backlog cleanup automation.
Useful open feature slice related to a broader security-sensitive/product area; keep it for maintainer review rather than close or merge.
The PR directly attempts to fix a security-sensitive reasoning/privacy leak report, so it should be handled by central OpenClaw security rather than ProjectClownfish cleanup.
Focused likely-fix PR for #92238, but plan-mode inventory cannot merge and should preserve it for maintainer review.
Maintainer technical/product judgment is explicitly required before deciding whether this contract should land, be redesigned, or remain open.
Open replacement PR with successful proof should remain available for normal maintainer review; no closure target is appropriate in this inventory shard.
The PR has an unresolved P1 review finding and failed real behavior proof, so maintainer technical judgment is needed before keeping, repairing, or closing.
Focused UI-surface fix remains independently useful and should stay open for maintainer review.
Broad, high-risk but potentially useful feature work should stay open as related backlog context, not be closed in this shard.
The PR touches SSRF policy enforcement and trusted proxy behavior, which belongs to central security handling.

needs_human: #84972 requires maintainer technical/product judgment on the Anthropic compact-then-fallback contract after a CHANGES_REQUESTED review.
#91332 requires maintainer technical judgment because Real behavior proof failed and an actionable P1 reentrant-lock review finding remains.
